claim_boundary.next_gate: advance 8192-shot candidate to calibrated-backend-property or independent-backend-transcript replay
claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: an iid theorem, universal shot threshold, calibrated hardware performance, real hardware execution, protocol or cryptographic soundness, sampling hardness, quantum advantage, BQP separation, or B10 credit
claim_boundary.what_is_supported: One publicly preregistered ideal/light Aer holdout verdict for the fixed tasks and 8192-shot candidate.

requirements.label: contract file matches the publicly posted SHA-256
contract binds the accepted R123 result payload
holdout root seeds are disjoint from R123
all trial rows preserve paired prefixes and bundles
the preregistered block/profile/task trial count is complete
all schedules are bound to unique hashes
block, pooled, leave-one-out, and transition ledgers are complete
all five preregistered conditions are evaluated per profile
no seed substitution, optional stopping, or threshold revision occurred
all fixed profile circuits are materialized
synthetic holdout verdict grants no hardware, advantage, or BQP credit

acceptance_conditions.label: minimum pooled task pass rate reaches the floor
minimum pooled Wilson lower reaches the floor
minimum leave-one-block-out Wilson lower reaches the floor
every block reaches the point floor
paired pass-to-fail transitions stay within the ceiling
